title: Inventory Profiles Plus
description: Inventory Profiles Plus is a client-side Fabric mod for custom inventory layouts, including Crystal PvP, Mace PvP, Sword PvP, Axe PvP, building, mining, and survival setups. Quickly sort items, cycle profiles, and keep gear exactly where you want it.
body:
Inventory Profiles Plus is a client-side Fabric mod that lets you create and switch between custom inventory sorting profiles for different playstyles.

Set up separate layouts for Crystal PvP, Mace PvP, Sword PvP, Axe PvP, mining, building, exploration, or everyday survival. With quick sorting and profile switching, you can instantly organize your hotbar and inventory around the setup you need.

Features include custom profiles, profile cycling keybinds, quick-sort controls, auto-sort options, item blacklisting, sound feedback, and an in-game configuration screen.

Great for PvP players who swap kits often, and for survival players who want cleaner inventories without constantly rearranging items by hand.
